---
title: "The Rev. Percy Monro"
---

## The Rev. Percy Monro

**Dates:** (1825/6-1883)

### Description

Vicar of Colden Common

### Biography

The Rev. Percy Monro was perpetual curate of Colden Common in 1859, vicar at the time of the 1881 census.  He married Caroline Albinia Walker in 1850.

### Letters

- Letter from 8th March 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
